chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-438 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 25.10.2016. Mr. Hatim Sakhi Rajpar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = This petition is disposed of by the following order:- The main grievance of the petitioner is that the private respondents are extending threats to the petitioner and pressurizing him to withdraw his cases pending in this Court. The comments of police officials/respondents are on record, whereunder they have denied the allegations of harassment and submit that no FIR is pending against the petitioner. Learned A.A.G further submits that the police officials will act strictly in accordance with law and they will discharge their duties in fair, just and reasonable manner and if they are approached by the petitioner for protection with such a request, the same will be provided in accordance with law. With this statement of learned A.A.G Sindh, the petitioner is satisfied. Consequently, this constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
